bands.guidance: Pollen concentrations are negligible; no activity changes are generally needed.
Pollen concentrations are low; highly sensitive people may take routine precautions.
Pollen concentrations are moderate; sensitive people should wash their face and nose after outdoor activity.
Pollen concentrations are high; people with pollen allergies should limit outdoor activity and wear a mask outside.
Pollen concentrations are very high; people with pollen allergies should avoid going outside, close windows, and use air filtration.
